mistake_1_chasing.what: Entering during manipulation instead of waiting for distribution retracement
mistake_1_chasing.fix: Wait for displacement AFTER sweep. Enter the retracement.

mistake_2_wrong_zone.what: Buying in premium or selling in discount

mistake_3_ignoring_htf.fix: HTF = direction. LTF = timing. Never trade LTF against HTF.

concepts_violated: liquidity (your SL IS liquidity that will be swept)
mistake_4_tight_stops.fix: Buffer beyond manipulation zone. Minimum 1.5x ATR.

mistake_5_no_DOL.fix: No DOL = no clear TP = skip.

mistake_6_no_displacement.what: Entering at OB/FVG that was NOT preceded by displacement
mistake_6_no_displacement.fix: OB/FVG without displacement = unproven zone. Wait for displacement to validate.
